code:
# Write your MySQL query statement below
SELECT
    d.name AS Department,
    e.name AS Employee,
    e.salary AS Salary
FROM (
    SELECT
        *,
        DENSE_RANK() OVER (
            PARTITION BY departmentId
            ORDER BY salary DESC
        ) AS salary_rank
    FROM Employee
) e
JOIN Department d
ON e.departmentId = d.id
WHERE salary_rank <= 3;
